ra_benchmark.conditional_assumptions: deterministic representative household, interior steady state, L=1
ra_benchmark.note: comparison only; no welfare or Pareto ordering

limitations: finite scans cannot rule out tangencies between points
numerical zero tolerance is not analytic exact equality
no global uniqueness claim without proof
